test-method.name: testSuccessfulRegistration
test-method.description: Verify a new customer can register successfully with valid details

test-method.name: testRegistrationValidationErrors
test-method.description: Verify validation errors are shown for various invalid/incomplete submissions

test-method.name: testRegistrationWithDuplicateUsername
test-method.description: Verify registering twice with the same username shows an already-exists error
